fabric_logs.message: Spike in incoming checkout requests detected: 8500 req/sec.
Connection pool exhausted on CheckoutService instances.
Thread starvation detected across all 8 Checkout nodes. Scale-out triggered.
Scale-out failed due to missing Azure capacity in region East US.
504 Gateway Timeout responses increasing. 100% of checkout traffic failing.
PaymentGateway circuit breaker OPEN. All outbound payment calls halting.
